raw_response:
As the owner of Śliwka w Kompot, Report B is significantly more useful. It goes beyond simple price comparisons to analyze *why* my strategy works, coining the "High Price + Massive Portion = Worth It" equation that perfectly captures our value proposition. It provides richer competitive intelligence, identifying not just prices but also specific operational weaknesses at places like Ni z Gruszki and Błękitny Pudel. Most importantly, Report B gives me a critical, immediately actionable insight: the reason for our lower TripAdvisor score among tourists is our kitchen's rigidity with special requests. I can address this with my chef this afternoon. The analysis of our on-premise "Queue-Generation" promotional strategy versus competitors' digital discounting validates my business instincts and gives me confidence in my current path. Report A is good, but B provides a much deeper, more textured, and ultimately more profitable understanding of my market position.

{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://trojmiasto.pl/", "https://nizgruszkinizpietruszki.pl/"]}
